scores.correctness_notes: Comprehensive and accurate. Covers collect_app_status/collect_unit_status, add_status(), leader-only vs all-units behavior, priority order, and ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus restriction. Slightly incorrect priority order stated as 'blocked > maintenance > waiting > active' — gold standard includes 'error' at highest priority, but response correctly notes ErrorStatus can't be used here so this is a minor omission rather than fabrication.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order listed as 'blocked > maintenance > waiting > active' omits 'error' which is the highest priority per gold standard. This is a minor inaccuracy since error is mentioned as unusable, but the priority ordering itself is slightly incomplete/misstated.
